checks.description: 验证 schema 新字段的序列化、反序列化和旧样本兼容行为。
evidence: python inline assertions for EvalSample/EvalRunRecord old/new payloads -> V001_SCHEMA_COMPAT_OK
checks.notes: Schema supports query_type fields and preserves backward compatibility for missing fields.

checks.description: 验证 replay 构建器在开启 query type 分类后能输出 query_type 相关字段，并在未开启时保持兼容。
checks.notes: Replay classification is explicit opt-in and disabled path remains compatible.

checks.description: 验证 live_rag_runner 输出的 records.jsonl 已透传 query_type 信息，且 scorer/reporter 能基于真实 run-record 形状数据输出 by_query_type 聚合。
evidence: Code inspection: app/evals/live_rag_runner.py writes query_type/hop_count/abstraction_level/evidence_topology/reasoning_hops/query_type_source into EvalRunRecord
Artifacts: .tmp_eval/s001_eval_qtype_check/summary.json and .tmp_eval/s001_eval_qtype_check/report.md include by_query_type and query-type sections
checks.notes: End-to-end path from run-record-shaped data to by_query_type summary/report is verified.

checks.description: 验证 seed import 能保留显式传入的 query_type 字段，并保持未提供这些字段的旧输入兼容。
evidence: python -m app.evals.import_seed_dataset with query-type payload -> tmp_eval/seed_qtype_eval_with
python -m app.evals.import_seed_dataset with legacy payload -> tmp_eval/seed_qtype_eval_without
checks.notes: Seed import preserves explicit query-type fields and keeps legacy no-query-type input behavior.
